prestazioni: Engine: M44/52 (3.0L inline-4, 8-valve SOHC) with forged Mahle pistons (8.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft by JE Pistons for 1,200+ hp capability under methanol injection

Turbocharger: Garrett GTX5533R Gen II with a 1.05 A/R turbine housing, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, and custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe by Agency Power, paired with a Spearco 1000hp intercooler core and Vibrant Performance silicone couplers

Fuel System: Dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2000cc/min), and a Holley Dominator ECU with a custom M44/52-specific tune by VF Engineering, including a methanol injection kit by Snow Performance (Stage 3 Boost Juice) with dual nozzles pre-intercooler

Drivetrain: G50/16 6-speed transmission with a Guard Industries billet aluminum differential cover, OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.11:1 final drive), and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) with a lightweight aluminum flywheel

Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, custom-valved for the 944 Cup chassis by KW Suspensions, paired with spherical bearing front control arms by 944 Motorsports and polyurethane rear trailing arm bushings by Powerflex (Black Series)

Braking: AP Racing CP9430 front calipers (6-piston) with 380mm two-piece rotors (floating hats by The Brake Man), and CP9431 rear calipers (4-piston) with 355mm rotors, using Ferodo DS3000 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid
estetica: Aero: Custom 944 Cup-widebody kit by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) with carbon fiber fenders (2.5-inch flares), a 964 Turbo-style front bumper with integrated canards by 944 Garage, and a GT3-spec rear diffuser by TechArt
Wheels: BBS RS-GT II (18x10.5 +25 front, 18x12 +30 rear) in gold with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)

Exterior: Full custom livery by The Paint Spot (Miami Blue with matte black accents), including a carbon fiber roof panel by 944 Motorsports, a 968 CS-style rear wing with adjustable Gurney flap, and Hella Rallye 3000 headlights with custom LED halos

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage by Matter Fab (chromoly, 1.75x0.120 wall thickness) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360), Sparco Pro 2000 seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub
